title: Claude Code v2.1.139
summary: Agent View (Research Preview): run 'claude agents' to see all sessions. /goal command: set completion conditions. /scroll-speed command. Hook: args[] field + continueOnBlock. MCP: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR env var. VS Code Cmd+Shift+T. 50+ bug fixes.

title: Code with Claude 2026 — Anthropic Developer Conference (San Francisco)
summary: Announced: Multiagent Orchestration, Outcomes, Dreaming. Claude Finance: 10 pre-built agents for financial services.

title: Higher Claude Code + API Usage Limits — SpaceX Colossus 1 Compute Deal
summary: 2x Claude Code 5-hour limits for Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise. Opus API Tier 1: +1500% input tokens/min. SpaceX Colossus 1: 300MW, 220k NVIDIA GPUs.

title: Anthropic $1.8B Compute Deal with Akamai
summary: Anthropic signed a $1.8 billion computing deal with Akamai Technologies.

title: Anthropic Deepens Push into Wall Street — Financial Services Agents
summary: 10 ready-to-run agent templates for banks. Claude for Microsoft 365 (Excel, PowerPoint, Word, Outlook).

title: Cursor 3.3 — Parallel Agents + PR Review

title: Zed 1.0 Stable — Parallel Agents in Same Window
summary: Multiple concurrent agents in same window. DeepSeek-V4-Pro/Flash support. Bookmarks, git:view commit, GIF in Markdown preview.

summary: HN discussion on remote MCP server support in Claude Code.
